name: Mobile Money and Digital Financial Inclusion Agents
description: Research on the human intermediary layer of mobile money and digital financial services in low-income settings, including how agents extend beyond payments to become general ICT brokers. Spans questions of trust, gender, social capital, and the operational realities of scaling agent networks in rural and underserved communities.

name: Satellite Imagery and Remote Sensing for Poverty and Socioeconomic Measurement
description: Work that uses satellite imagery, machine learning, and other remotely-sensed data to predict socioeconomic indicators such as poverty, wealth, and vulnerability at scale. Bridges CS fundamentals (computer vision, prediction models) with impact evaluation and development measurement where traditional survey data is sparse or costly.
